One foundation for every project

Install once. Stay current for years.

A tested, actively maintained Drupal template that gives your whole team
one production-ready foundation for every project - so your engineers get straight to building.

Standardize every Drupal project

The same tools, commands, and workflows on every project, so anyone can move between them without missing a beat.

ONE STACK · EVERY PROJECT

Set up in minutes

Start from a battle-tested foundation - containers, CI, hosting, and tooling - refined across hundreds of real Drupal projects.

PRODUCTION-READY DAY ONE

Effortless upgrades

Monthly releases keep Drupal, PHP, and tooling current, long after launch.

MONTHLY RELEASES

Centralized documentation

One place your whole team turns to for answers, plus a scaffold for your project's own docs.

REFERENCE · ONBOARDING
AI-agent ready
Free & open source
A tested toolchain
A new release every month
Set up once, standardized across your portfolio, and kept current for the life of every project.
vortextemplate.com
